name: forgeflow
description: An artifact-first workflow contract plus a lightweight enforcement runtime for Codex: staged workflow, gates, evidence, and independent review

interface.shortDescription: Artifact-first planning, execution, review, verification, and finish workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use ForgeFlow to guide coding agents through artifact-backed clarify, plan, execute, review, verify, ship, and finish workflows with explicit gates and evidence instead of chat-memory vibes. After installing the plugin, use slash-style prompts such as /forgeflow:init, /forgeflow:clarify, /forgeflow:plan, /forgeflow:execute, /forgeflow:review, /forgeflow:ship, and /forgeflow:finish.
